user_claim: Customer: Parking lot mein meri car ko scrape lag gaya. | Support: Aap kis type ka damage report karna chahte hain? | Customer: Front side par mark aa gaya hai, bumper ke upar. | Support: Light damage hai ya body par scratch? | Customer: Light theek hai, front bumper par scratch hai. Photos upload kar diye hain.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The first image (img_1) clearly shows scrape marks and deformation on the front bumper, which aligns with the user's claim. The evidence is clear and meets the required standard.
claim_status_justification: img_1 shows scrape marks and deformation on the front bumper, which aligns with the user's claim of a scratch on the front bumper. The evidence is clear and relevant.
